description: When you have the desire to hang out in style, wear the Luz sandals from buckaroo, and you'll easily be the most stylish person at the gathering! The thickly cushioned footbed will make you feel like you're literally walking on clouds all day. You might even not want to take them off when you get home! Pair them with jeans, shorts or cargos for a fabulous casual look. Upper Full grain leather straps for added durability and style Over-the-foot straps in a criss cross design for better structure and comfort Contrast stitch detailing for added attraction Velcro fastener on the forefoot, around the ankle in the front and back to lock the foot in place Metal hoops on the sides for straps to pass through Branding on the ankle strap and metal hoops Midsole EVA midsole with shock absorbers for lightweight comfort Well-cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Fabric lining for extra comfort Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant and flexible rubber outsole for better shock absorption Horizantal grooves all over the outsole for better grip shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
